module.name: no-fetch-in-tests
module.description: Disallow fetch usage in recognized test files.

scenarios.name: should report direct fetch calls in test files
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression

scenarios.name: should report global object fetch calls in test files
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression

scenarios.name: should allow fetch calls outside test files
scenarios.given: fetch(url) inside a non-test source file
scenarios.when: the rule creates listeners for the file
scenarios.then: no listeners are registered and no violation is reported

scenarios.name: should allow non-global fetch methods in test files
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because the object is not a recognized global fetch object
